name: What if claim denied because AI chats showed I expected unreal damages?

mainEntity.name: What if claim denied because AI chats showed I expected unreal damages?

acceptedAnswer.description: Denial appealable if chats inadmissible, but courts likely admit per NY precedent.[1] Argue irrelevance.[1] Key factors: context, prejudice vs. probative.[1] Appeal promptly, motion to suppress, strong alternative evidence.[1] Uphill battle.
